data.name: Sex Game - Naughty Girls - Episode 9
data.detailed_description:
Enjoy an erotic visual novel featuring two hot women and an engaging sex simulator. Follow their story, get lost in their steamy conversations, and take control by choosing from a variety of positions to bring them to ecstasy.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Juliette and Natalie book a reservation at a luxurious SPA. The warm shower, the hot sauna and being alone in the entire SPA, is just too inviting and they quickly engage in sex, in the hot sauna. 
  

Control the sex between the two of them.
Follow the 2 sliders and keep the sex going by pressing SPACE or CLICKING THE MOUSE at the right time, to avoid the arousal level to drop or your stamina to run out, and lose the game.
Go through various sex styles and positions, to avoid the arousal level to stop increasing.
All this, in high quality, realistic animations and renderings.

FEATURES

- Image and video gallery, so you can enjoy the animations and renderings.
- HD renders and animations.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
